debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
x : α
h : (x : α) → @Graph.inessential α β G x
hx : x ∈ G.vertexSet
⊢ ¬Matroid.IsColoop (@Graph.matchingMatroid α β G) x

failed_attempts:
intro hco
  rcases h x with ⟨M, hM, hxM⟩
  have hxE : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := by simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, Graph.matchingIndepMatroid]
  have hxN : x ∉ M.E := by
    by_contra hx'
    exact hxM (hM.1.subset_ground hx')
  have hmax : M.eRank = G.matchingMatroid.eRank := by
    simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, Graph.matchingIndepMatroid] using congrArg Matroid.eRank (rfl : M = G.matchingMatroid)
  have hxcl : x ∈ M.cl (M.E \ {x}) := by
    simpa [Matroid.IsColoop, hxE] using hco
  have hxcl' : x ∈ M.cl M.E := by
    exact M.cl_mono (by intro y hy; exact hy.1) hxcl
  have : x ∈ M.E := by
    simpa [Matroid.cl_eq] using hxcl'
  exact hxN this

classical
  rcases h x with ⟨M, hM, hxM⟩
  have hxE : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := hx

      have hB : G.matchingMatroid.IsBasis (V(G, M)) := by

        · exact ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, by rfl, (by intro y hy; exact hsubset y hy)⟩
        · intro T hT hVT
          rcases hVT with ⟨M', hM', hTV⟩
          have hle := hM.max M' hM'
          have hcard : (V(G, M')).encard ≤ (V(G, M)).encard := by
            simpa [Graph.V, Set.encard_image, Set.encard_product] using
              (mul_le_mul_left' (show (2 : ℕ∞) ≤ 2 by rfl) hle)
          exact le_antisymm (by
            refine Set.encard_le_encard ?_
            intro y hyT
            exact (hTV hyT)) (by
            refine Set.encard_le_encard ?_
            intro y hyV
            exact (by
              have : y ∈ (V(G, M) : Set α) := hyV
              exact hTV (by simpa using this)))
      have := hcol.mem_of_mem_of_isBasis hB hxE
      exact this
    exact this
  exact hxM hmem

    · refine ⟨M, hMmax.toIsMatching, subset_rfl⟩
    · intro I hI hVI
      have hI' : ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ I ⊆ V(G, M') := hI
      rcases hI' with ⟨M', hM', hIsub⟩
      have hVsub : V(G, M) ⊆ V(G, M') := by
        by_contra hnot
        have hmax' : ¬ G.IsMaxMatching M := by
          intro hmaxM
          have := (IsMaxMatching.encard (G := G) (M := M) hmaxM)
          have := (IsMaxMatching.encard (G := G) (M := M') (by
            refine (IsMatching.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset (G := G) (M := M') hM' ?_)
            intro v hv
            exact (G.vertexSet_inc_of_mem_vertexSet_edges (hIsub hv)))).trans ?_
          · exact hnot (by
              intro v hv
              exact (G.vertexSet_inc_of_mem_vertexSet_edges (hIsub hv)))
          · exact le_rfl
        exact hmax' hMmax
      exact hVsub hVI
    · intro v hv
      exact (G.vertexSet_inc_of_mem_vertexSet_edges hv)
  have hcl : x ∈ M✶.cl (V(G, M)) := by
    exact (M✶.cl_mono hsub) hmem
  have : x ∈ V(G, M) := by
    simpa [hbas.cl] using hcl
  exact hxM this

rcases h x with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
  intro hcol
  have hx' : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.closure (V(G, M)) := by
    simpa using hcol.mem_closure_of_mem hx
  exact hxM (by
    simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, IndepMatroid.matroid] using
      hx')

classical
  intro hxC
  rcases h x with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
  have hb : G.matchingMatroid.IsBase (V(G, M)) := by
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · refine ⟨M, hMmax.toIsMatching, subset_rfl⟩
    · intro I hI hVI
      rcases hI with ⟨M', hM', hI'⟩
      have hM'enc : M'.encard ≤ M.encard := hMmax.max _ hM'
      have hV' : (I.encard : ℕ∞) ≤ (V(G, M')).encard := by
        exact (encard_mono hI').trans_eq (by rfl)
      have hV'' : (V(G, M')).encard ≤ (2 : ℕ∞) * M'.encard := by
        simpa [two_mul] using (G.encard_vertexSet_le_two_mul_encard_edgeSet (s := M'))
      have hV : (I.encard : ℕ∞) ≤ (2 : ℕ∞) * M.encard := by
        exact hV'.trans (hV''.trans (by gcongr))
      have hVM : (V(G, M)).encard = (2 : ℕ∞) * M.encard := by
        simpa using (G.encard_vertexSet_eq_two_mul_encard_edgeSet_of_isMatching hMmax.toIsMatching)
      have hIle : I.encard ≤ (V(G, M)).encard := by
        simpa [hVM] using hV
      exact (encard_le_encard hVI).trans hIle
  have hxnot : x ∉ V(G, M) := hxM
  have hxmemE : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := hx
  have hxmemB : x ∈ V(G, M) := hxC.mem_of_isBase_of_mem_ground hb hxmemE
  exact hxnot hxmemB

intro hxcol
  obtain ⟨M, hMmax, hxnot⟩ := h x
  have hxE : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := by
    simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hx
  have hxcl : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.cl (V(G, M)) := by
    simpa [Matroid.IsColoop] using hxcol.mem_closure_of_mem hxE
  have hsubset : V(G, M) ⊆ G.matchingMatroid.E := by
    intro v hv
    rcases hv with ⟨e, heM, hv⟩
    have : v ∈ V(G) := by
      rcases hv with (hv | hv) <;> exact (hMmax.subset heM) |>.inc_left_mem hv
    simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using this
  have hVcl : G.matchingMatroid.cl (V(G, M)) = V(G, M) := by
    simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, Matroid.cl_eq] using
      (G.matchingMatroid.cl_eq_of_subset_ground hsubset)
  have : x ∈ V(G, M) := by simpa [hVcl] using hxcl
  exact hxnot this

classical
  intro hcol
  rcases h x with ⟨M, hMmax, hxnot⟩
  have hxE : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := by simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid]
  have hxcl : x ∈ (G.matchingMatroid.closure (G.matchingMatroid.E \ {x})) := by
    simpa [Matroid.IsColoop, hxE] using hcol
  have hxind : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.Indep (G.matchingMatroid.E \ {x}) := by
    exact Matroid.not_indep_of_mem_closure_diff hxcl (by simpa using hxE)
  have hmatch : ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ (G.matchingMatroid.E \ {x}) ⊆ V(G, M') := by
    refine ⟨M, hMmax.toIsMatching, ?_⟩
    intro y hy
    by_contra hynV
    have hmax' : G.IsMaxMatching M := hMmax
    have henc : M.encard = ν(G) := hmax'.encard
    have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := by
      have : y ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := hy.1
      simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using this
    have hyn : y ∉ V(G, M) := hynV
    have hiness : G.inessential y := h y
    rcases hiness with ⟨M2, hM2max, hy2not⟩
    have henc2 : M2.encard = ν(G) := hM2max.encard
    have : y ∈ V(G, M2) := by
      have hyE : y ∈ V(G) := hyV
      have hsub : V(G) ⊆ V(G, M2) := by
        intro z hz
        by_contra hzn
        have : G.IsMaxMatching M2 := hM2max
        exact (hzn (by
          have := hz
          simpa using this))
      exact hsub hyE
    exact hy2not this
  have : G.matchingMatroid.Indep (G.matchingMatroid.E \ {x}) := by
    rcases hmatch with ⟨M', hM', hsub⟩
    refine ⟨M', hM', ?_⟩
    simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hsub
  exact hxind this

classical
  intro hxcol
  rcases h x with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
  have hxE : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := by
    simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, hx]
  have hxcl : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.closure (G.matchingMatroid.E \ {x}) := by
    simpa [Matroid.IsColoop] using hxcol hxE
  have hbase : G.matchingMatroid.IsBase (V(G, M)) := by
    have hI : (G.matchingIndepMatroid.Indep (V(G, M))) := by
      refine ⟨M, hMmax.toIsMatching, ?_⟩
      intro y hy
      exact hy
    have hMmax' : G.matchingIndepMatroid.IsMaximalIndep (V(G, M)) := by
      intro I hI' hsub
      have hle : I.encard ≤ (V(G, M)).encard := by
        rcases hI' with ⟨M', hM', hI'M'⟩
        have hMM' : M'.encard ≤ M.encard := hMmax.max _ hM'
        have hVI : I.encard ≤ (V(G, M')).encard := by
          have : I ⊆ V(G, M') := hI'M'
          exact encard_le_encard this
        have hVle : (V(G, M')).encard ≤ (V(G, M)).encard := by
          simpa [Graph.V] using (mul_le_mul_left' hMM' 2)
        exact hVI.trans hVle
      exact (Set.eq_of_subset_of_encard_le hsub hle).symm
    exact (G.matchingIndepMatroid.isBase_iff.mp ⟨hI, hMmax'⟩)
  have hxnot : x ∉ V(G, M) := hxM
  have hxmem : x ∈ V(G, M) := by
    have hcl' : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.closure ((V(G, M)) \ {x}) := by
      have hsubset : (V(G, M)) \ {x} ⊆ G.matchingMatroid.E \ {x} := by
        intro y hy
        refine ⟨?_, hy.2⟩
        have : y ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := by
          have : y ∈ V(G) := (G.V_subset_vertexSet M) hy.1
          simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using this
        simpa using this
      exact G.matchingMatroid.closure_mono hsubset hxcl
    have : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.closure (V(G, M)) := by
      exact G.matchingMatroid.closure_mono (by
        intro y hy
        exact hy) hcl'
    exact hbase.mem_closure_iff.mp this
  exact hxnot hxmem

intro hcol
  rcases h x with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
  have hbase : G.matchingMatroid.IsBase (V(G, M)) := by
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · refine ⟨M, hMmax.toIsMatching, le_rfl⟩
    · intro I hI hVI
      rcases hI with ⟨M', hM', hsub⟩
      have hcard : I.encard ≤ (V(G, M')).encard := by
        exact encard_le_encard hsub
      have hVM' : (V(G, M')).encard ≤ (V(G, M)).encard := by
        have : M'.encard ≤ M.encard := hMmax.max _ hM'
        simpa [Graph.vertexSet_edges_encard_eq_two_mul_encard (G := G) hM'.subset,
          Graph.vertexSet_edges_encard_eq_two_mul_encard (G := G) hMmax.toIsMatching.subset] using
          (mul_le_mul_left' this 2)
      exact (hcard.trans hVM').trans (encard_le_encard hVI)
  have hxmem : x ∈ V(G, M) := by
    have := hcol.mem_of_isBase hbase
    simpa using this
  exact hxM hxmem

classical
  rcases h x with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
  have hB : G.matchingMatroid.IsBase (V(G, M)) := by
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · refine ⟨M, hMmax.toIsMatching, ?_⟩
      rfl
    · intro I hI hVI
      rcases hI with ⟨M', hM', hI⟩
      have hle : I.encard ≤ (V(G, M)).encard := by
        have hle' : (M'.encard : ℕ∞) ≤ M.encard := hMmax.max M' hM'
        have hIle : (I.encard : ℕ∞) ≤ (V(G, M')).encard := by
          exact (encard_le_encard hI).trans_eq (by rfl)
        have hVM' : (V(G, M')).encard = 2 * M'.encard := by
          simpa using (hM'.encard_vertex_eq_two_mul_encard (G := G))
        have hVM : (V(G, M)).encard = 2 * M.encard := by
          simpa using (hMmax.toIsMatching.encard_vertex_eq_two_mul_encard (G := G))
        have : (I.encard : ℕ∞) ≤ (2 * M'.encard : ℕ∞) := by
          simpa [hVM'] using hIle
        have : (I.encard : ℕ∞) ≤ (2 * M.encard : ℕ∞) := this.trans (mul_le_mul_left' hle')
        simpa [hVM] using this
      exact (encard_le_encard_iff.1 hle).2 hVI
  have hxnot : x ∉ V(G, M) := hxM
  intro hxcol
  exact hxnot (hxcol.mem_of_isBase hB hx)

classical
  intro hcol
  rcases h x with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
  have hbase : (G.matchingMatroid).IsBase (V(G, M)) := by
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · refine ⟨M, hMmax.toIsMatching, le_rfl⟩
    · intro I hI hsub
      rcases hI with ⟨M', hM', hIV⟩
      have hcard : I.encard ≤ (V(G, M)).encard := by
        refine (encard_le_encard ?_).trans ?_
        · exact hsub
        · exact encard_le_encard hIV
      have hmax' : M'.encard ≤ M.encard := hMmax.max M' hM'
      have hVM : (V(G, M)).encard = 2 * M.encard := by
        simpa using (hMmax.toIsMatching.encard_vertexSet_eq_two_mul_encard (G := G) (M := M))
      have hVM' : (V(G, M')).encard = 2 * M'.encard := by
        simpa using (hM'.encard_vertexSet_eq_two_mul_encard (G := G) (M := M'))
      have : (V(G, M')).encard ≤ (V(G, M)).encard := by
        simpa [hVM, hVM'] using (mul_le_mul_left' hmax' 2)
      exact hcard.trans this
  have hxmem : x ∉ (V(G, M)) := hxM
  have hxground : x ∈ (G.matchingMatroid).E := by
    simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, IndepMatroid.matroid] using hx
  have hbase' : (G.matchingMatroid).IsBase ((V(G, M)) ∪ {x}) := by
    exact hcol.isBase_insert_of_isBase hbase hxmem hxground
  exact hbase'.not_subset hbase.subset_ground (by
    intro y hy
    exact Or.inl hy)

classical
  intro hco
  obtain ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩ := h x
  have hxE : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := by simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid]
  have hxcl : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.cl (G.matchingMatroid.E \ {x}) := by
    exact hco.mem_cl_diff_singleton hxE
  have hsub :
      V(G, M) ⊆ G.matchingMatroid.cl (G.matchingMatroid.E \ {x}) := by
    have hclE : G.matchingMatroid.cl (G.matchingMatroid.E \ {x}) ⊆ G.matchingMatroid.E :=
      G.matchingMatroid.cl_subset_ground _
    intro v hv
    exact hclE (hxcl)
  have hxmem : x ∈ V(G, M) := by
    have : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.cl (G.matchingMatroid.E \ {x}) := hxcl
    exact False.elim (hxM <| by
      have : x ∈ V(G, M) := by
        by_contra hx'
        exact hx' (by
          simpa using hx')
      exact this)
  exact hxM hxmem

classical
  intro hcol
  rcases h x with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
  have hb : G.matchingMatroid.IsBasis (V(G, M)) := by
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · refine ⟨M, hMmax.toIsMatching, subset_rfl⟩
    · intro I hI hVI
      rcases hI with ⟨M', hM', hIV⟩
      have hM'cd : M'.encard ≤ M.encard := hMmax.max M' hM'
      have hVM' : (V(G, M')).encard ≤ (V(G, M)).encard := by
        simpa [Graph.vertexSet_edges_encard_eq_two_mul_encard (h := hM'.toIsMatching),
          Graph.vertexSet_edges_encard_eq_two_mul_encard (h := hMmax.toIsMatching)] using
          (mul_le_mul_left' hM'cd 2)
      have hIcd : I.encard ≤ (V(G, M)).encard := (encard_le_encard hIV).trans hVM'
      exact hIcd
  have hxnot : x ∉ V(G, M) := hxM
  have hxmem : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := by simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hx
  have hcl := hcol.mem_of_isBasis_of_not_mem hb hxnot
  exact hxnot hcl

classical
  intro hco
  obtain ⟨M, hMmax, hxnot⟩ := h x
  have hxE : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := by simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, hx]
  have hxcl : x ∈ (G.matchingMatroid.closure (G.matchingMatroid.E \ {x})) := by
    simpa [Matroid.IsColoop] using hco hxE
  have hxcl' : x ∈ (G.matchingMatroid.closure (V(G) \ {x})) := by
    simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hxcl
  have hxmem : x ∈ V(G, M) := by
    have hbase : G.matchingMatroid.IsBase (V(G, M)) := by
      have hInd : G.matchingMatroid.Indep (V(G, M)) := by
        refine ⟨M, hMmax.toIsMatching, ?_⟩
        intro v hv
        exact hv
      refine hInd.isBase_of_forall_insert ?_
      intro y hyE hynmem
      exfalso
      have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := by
        simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hyE
      have hsu : V(G) ⊆ V(G, M) := by
        intro v hv
        by_contra hvn
        have hmax' : G.IsMaxMatching M := hMmax
        have hMmaxv := (h v).choose_spec.1
        have hvavoid := (h v).choose_spec.2
        have henc := IsMaxMatching.encard (M := (h v).choose) hMmaxv
        have hencM := IsMaxMatching.encard (M := M) hmax'
        have hle : M.encard ≤ (h v).choose.encard := by
          have := hmax'.max (h v).choose (h v).choose_spec.1.toIsMatching
          simpa using this
        have hge : (h v).choose.encard ≤ M.encard := by
          have := hMmaxv.max M hmax'.toIsMatching
          simpa using this
        have hEq : M.encard = (h v).choose.encard := le_antisymm hle hge
        have : V(G, M) = V(G, (h v).choose) := by
          apply subset_antisymm
          · intro a ha
            by_contra han
            have hMaug : ∃ P, G.IsAugPath hmax'.toIsMatching P := by
              have : ¬ G.IsMaxMatching M := by
                intro hmax2
                have hEq2 : M.encard = ν(G) := IsMaxMatching.encard (M := M) hmax2
                have hEq3 : (h v).choose.encard = ν(G) := by
                  simpa using IsMaxMatching.encard (M := (h v).choose) (h v).choose_spec.1
                exact (by simpa [hEq2, hEq3] using congrArg id hEq)
              exact IsMatching.exists_isAugPath_not_max (M := M) hmax'.toIsMatching this
            obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hMaug
            have hM' := hP.augment
            have hsub := hP.augment_vertex_subset
            have hcard := hP.augment_encard
            have hcontr : M.encard < (M ∆ E(P)).encard := by
              simpa [hcard] using lt_add_of_pos_right (n := M.encard) (m := 1) (by decide : 0 < 1)
            have := hmax'.max (M ∆ E(P)) hM'
            exact not_le_of_lt hcontr this
          · intro a ha
            by_contra han
            have hMaug : ∃ P, G.IsAugPath (h v).choose_spec.1.toIsMatching P := by
              have : ¬ G.IsMaxMatching (h v).choose := by
                intro hmax2
                have hEq2 : (h v).choose.encard = ν(G) := IsMaxMatching.encard (M := (h v).choose) hmax2
                have hEq3 : M.encard = ν(G) := by
                  simpa using IsMaxMatching.encard (M := M) hmax'
                exact (by simpa [hEq2, hEq3] using congrArg id hEq.symm)
              exact IsMatching.exists_isAugPath_not_max (M := (h v).choose) (h v).choose_spec.1.toIsMatching this
            obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hMaug
            have hM' := hP.augment
            have hsub := hP.augment_vertex_subset
            have hcard := hP.augment_encard
            have hcontr : (h v).choose.encard < ((h v).choose ∆ E(P)).encard := by
              simpa [hcard] using lt_add_of_pos_right (n := (h v).choose.encard) (m := 1) (by decide : 0 < 1)
            have := (h v).choose_spec.1.max ((h v).choose ∆ E(P)) hM'
            exact not_le_of_lt hcontr this
        exact (hMmax'.toIsMatching.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset (by simpa [this]) ).maxDegree_le_one
      exact hsu y hyV |> False.elim
  exact hxnot (by
    have hbase : G.matchingMatroid.IsBase (V(G, M)) := by
      have hInd : G.matchingMatroid.Indep (V(G, M)) := by
        refine ⟨M, hMmax.toIsMatching, ?_⟩
        intro v hv
        exact hv
      refine hInd.isBase_of_forall_insert ?_
      intro y hyE hynmem
      have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := by
        simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hyE
      exfalso
      exact hynmem (by simpa using hyV)
    exact hbase.subset_closure_diff_singleton hxmem hx)

intro hcol
  rcases h x with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
  have hxE : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := by simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hx
  have hxcl : x ∈ (G.matchingMatroid.closure (G.matchingMatroid.E \ {x})) := by
    simpa [Matroid.IsColoop] using hcol hxE
  have hxcl' : x ∈ (G.matchingMatroid.closure (V(G) \ {x})) := by
    simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hxcl
  have hxmem : x ∈ V(G) \ {x} := by
    simpa [hxM, matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hxcl'
  exact hxmem.2 rfl
